title: The Invisible Artery
overview: Vicenç is a politician with mayor aspirations married to Carme. She is unhappy with their marriage and lives obsessed about having children. A young boy who was a part of their lives fifteen years ago starts a process that will destroy Vicenç in a professional and personal way.

trailers.title: THE INVISIBLE ARTERY Trailer [eng]
trailers.channel_name: PÖFF | Tallinn Black Nights Film Festival
